---
title: "Projects"
listing:
  contents: list
  type: grid
  fields: [image, title, description, categories, date]
  categories: true
  sort: "date desc"
  grid-columns: 2
  image-placeholder: ../images/project1-cover.jpg
---

A selection of data analytics projects completed during my MSc in Business Analytics at Dublin City University. Each project uses real or realistic datasets with executable Python code and interactive visualisations.
